element_introduction_order.mastery_context: foundational sport mechanics before hazards introduced

element_introduction_order.element: Team selection (3 mutant species: robots, undead skeletons, trolls)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: offensive strategy; puck explodes when opposing player picks it up
tactical manipulation; fake penalties against opponents
defensive risk/reward; huge demon head replaces net; explodes on scoring
environmental resource collection; unpredictable drops from crowd
field navigation hazard; corpses remain on ice until slug resurfacer clears them between periods
melee skill; knockout objective with additional penalties for losing

typical_relief_triggers: between-period breaks with slug ice resurfacer clearing corpses/debris
penalty box time-outs after fights or fouls
typical_tension_triggers: bribed referee fake penalties against player team
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: fast-paced action with escalating hazard density; tension driven by unpredictable environmental events and special plays rather than progressive difficulty curve

difficulty_curve.early_game: foundational hockey mechanics with basic hazard introduction (mines, holes); team selection with skull ratings 0-6 allows self-selected difficulty scaling
difficulty_curve.mid_game: escalation of special mechanics (exploding puck, demon goalies, crowd weapons, fight minigames); corpse persistence increases field complexity
notable_spikes: first hazard collision requiring spatial awareness shift
demon goalie introduction increasing defensive stakes
fight minigame mechanics requiring melee skill execution

notable_level_patterns.description: Hockey rink layout with scattered land mines and holes creating spatial avoidance puzzles; corpses accumulate as play progresses, adding dynamic obstacles until period-end resurfacing
Exploding puck, referee bribery, and crowd weapon drops create unpredictable tactical shifts; demon goalie substitution option allows high-risk defensive plays
Combat minigame breaks hockey flow; knockout objective with penalty box consequence; adds melee skill requirement to primarily sports-action gameplay
